summary: v1.2 innovation upgrade fully tested — backend (23/23 pytest pass) and frontend (all 7 new flows verified on 390x844 mobile viewport). Intention, Journal+AI reflection, Rituals CRUD+complete/undo, /parse/priority (NL→structured), weekly narrative, morning brief north_star+intention, and updated /profile/reset + /profile/export all work end-to-end. New frontend surfaces (NorthStarCard, IntentionModal, QuickAddInput, /journal, /rituals, weekly card on /insights, Settings YOUR TOOLS) all render with correct testIDs and integrate correctly with backend AI (Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-5 via emergent key).

issues: Pre-existing console warnings (non-blocking): 'shadow* style props are deprecated, use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents' — RN-Web deprecations from underlying libraries, safe to ignore.

action_items: OPTIONAL regression carryover from iter_4: insights-row in Settings may still be intercepted by the central 'Ask' FAB on certain scroll positions (reported in iteration_4). This iteration did not re-verify the tap routing for journal-row/rituals-row/insights-row — all three testIDs are PRESENT in /settings but tap navigation was not exercised this round. Main agent should verify on device/viewport that tapping each row routes to /journal, /rituals, /insights respectively without FAB interception.

MINOR cosmetic: on the intention-pill the concatenated textContent is 'TODAYFocused' (no separator in rendered DOM); visually the pill shows 'TODAY · Focused' correctly via separate Text children — not a bug, just a note for future text-content selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1279 lines — over the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting into routers (intention_router.py, journal_router.py, rituals_router.py, brief_router.py) before the next upgrade iteration.

DRY: generate_outfit / generate_quote / generate_insights / generate_journal_reflection / parse_priority / weekly_brief all duplicate the LlmChat setup pattern. Extract a small helper `ai_json(system, user_prompt, session_prefix)` that returns parsed JSON or raw text to cut ~40 lines.

/api/journal POST does the AI call AFTER inserting the doc then updates the doc. If the AI call is slow (~3-8s), the client waits on the full round-trip. Consider returning the doc immediately with reflection=null and streaming/polling the reflection, or keep as-is and add a client-side loading state (already present). Also: the background `update_one` is awaited serially, fine.
reset_all deletes profiles but does not delete chat_messages — user chat history survives reset. Consider `db.chat_messages.delete_many({})` scoped by session prefix or persist chat per-user.
Rituals steps length is capped at 8 silently; UI should communicate this limit (currently unclear to user).

parse_priority falls back to category 'Personal' on any error/malformed JSON — silently losing signal. Consider returning a 'parse_confidence' or letting the UI know it fell back so it can prompt the user.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_upgrade_v12.py (NEW — 23 tests covering v1.2 endpoints + regression smoke)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of new v1.2 flows exercised (6/6): intention modal+save+persistence, quick-add parse→north-star, journal create+AI reflection+delete-available, rituals create modal+emoji+steps+save, weekly generate narrative, settings YOUR TOOLS rows visible

seed_data_creation: No permanent seed. Reset-before-suite fixture cleans per-run. Test data prefixed 'TEST_' and TEST_Morning/TEST_UI/TEST_reset were created and cleaned by module-scope reset_state fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v1.2 backend endpoints verified green: GET/PUT /api/intention, GET/POST/DELETE /api/journal, full /api/rituals CRUD + /complete + /undo, POST /api/parse/priority (correctly returns category='Connect' time='3:00 PM' for 'call mom tomorrow 3pm'), GET /api/brief/weekly (returns range+narrative+totals), updated POST /api/brief/morning (includes 'intention' and 'north_star' — north_star prefers timed-undone), updated DELETE /api/profile/reset (wipes intentions, journal, rituals, ritual_completions), updated GET /api/profile/export (returns intentions, journal, rituals). Frontend testIDs confirmed: intention-pill, intention-modal, intention-chip-{Focused,Kind,Bold,...}, intention-save, quick-add, quick-add-input, quick-add-send, north-star, north-star-empty, screen-journal, journal-input, journal-save, journal-back, journal-entry-{id}, screen-rituals, rituals-add, rituals-back, create-ritual-modal, ritual-name-input, ritual-emoji-{emoji}, ritual-step-0..N, ritual-add-step, ritual-save, weekly-generate, weekly-refresh, journal-row, rituals-row, insights-row. Settings lives at /settings (NOT /you — /you returns 404). Onboarding prompt appears only on fresh state (after /api/profile/reset). Preview URL respects EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Emergent LLM key is working (Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 calls succeed in ~1-3s).
rca_of_issue: No new issues detected this iteration. Only carryover: iteration_4 reported insights-row FAB-overlay at certain scroll Y; that was not re-tested here because the feature scope for this review was adding/testing new v1.2 surfaces, and the three YOUR TOOLS testIDs are all present and visible. If the FAB interception is still an issue after v1.2 changes, it would manifest as tapping insights-row navigating to /decide — main agent should verify quickly.
